abilities.description: Attack 3-5 times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict Bleed.Upgraded: Attack 3-10 times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict Bleed.

translation.ru_description: Атакуйте 3-5 раз по 1 урону. Эти атаки вызывают Кровотечение.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Атакуйте 3-10 раз по 1 урону. Эти атаки вызывают Кровотечение.
translation.en_description: Attack 3-5 times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict Bleed.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Attack 3-10 times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict Bleed.

abilities.description: Attack five times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict all status effects your basic attack does.Upgraded: Attack five times with damage that scales with Strength. These attacks inflict all status effects your basic attack does.

translation.ru_description: Атакуйте пять раз по 1 урону. Накладывает эффекты базовой атаки.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Атакуйте пять раз (урон зависит от [img:str]). Накладывает эффекты базовой атаки.
translation.en_description: Attack five times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict all status effects your basic attack does.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Attack five times with damage that scales with [img:str]. These attacks inflict all status effects your basic attack does.

abilities.description: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat twice more.Upgraded: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat four more times.

translation.ru_description: Рывок на клетку и круговая атака с Рассечением. Повторить еще 2 раза.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Рывок на клетку и круговая атака с Рассечением. Повторить еще 4 раза.
translation.en_description: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat twice more.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat four more times.

abilities.description: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat twice more.Upgraded: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat four more times.

translation.ru_description: Рывок на клетку и круговая атака с Рассечением. Повторить еще 2 раза.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Рывок на клетку и круговая атака с Рассечением. Повторить еще 4 раза.
translation.en_description: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat twice more.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat four more times.
